---
title: "Page Not Found"
---

# 🧑‍🏫 Oops! Page 404

This corner of the Instructor Hub doesn't exist (or hasn't been published
yet). It may have been moved while we re-organize the course adoption
materials for the dual-volume release.

## 🧭 Where to go next

- [🏠 Instructor Hub home](/)
- [🗺️ Course Map](/course-map.html)
- [🎞️ Lecture Slides](https://mlsysbook.ai/slides/)
- [📖 Volume I: Foundations](https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/)
- [📖 Volume II: At Scale](https://mlsysbook.ai/vol2/)

## 🔍 Search

Use the navbar search to find policy templates, syllabus modules, and
adoption guides across the hub.

## 🐛 Still lost?

- [📝 Report a missing page](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/issues/new)
- [💬 Ask the community](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions)

---

*"The best lesson plans always need one revision. So do their URLs."* 📝
